surfaces.SKILL.md:
---
name: keelplane
description: Keelplane skill entrypoint. Use when a user asks for dynamic workflows.
---
# Keelplane Skill Entrypoint
surfaces.agents/openai.yaml:
interface:
  display_name: "Keelplane"
  default_prompt: "Use $keelplane to design a workflow."
surfaces.README.md:
# Keelplane

Keelplane uses DWM Core and the skill is named `keelplane`.
surfaces.docs/dwm-branding.md:
# Keelplane Branding

Keelplane is the public product brand.
DWM Core stands for Deterministic Workflow Machine.
The Codex skill name is `keelplane`.
The repository slug remains `dwm`.
Do not claim autonomous execution.
